Homepage.name: I'm Milena Sol Aron
Homepage.role: DevOps & SRE Engineer - Software Developer - Writer

About.introduction:
DevOps and Site Reliability Engineer with experience supporting production systems, improving deployment pipelines, and working with cloud-based infrastructure. I have experience working in production environments with 30.000+ users.

Background in full-stack development combined with hands-on experience in CI/CD, monitoring, and automation. Strong focus on reliability, scalability, and system stability.

I bring a proactive and ownership-driven mindset, with strong attention to detail and a continuous drive to improve both my skills and the systems I work on.
About.about-website-technologies: The technologies used are Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Remark and next-intl.

Resume.job3-responsibility-1-1: Maintained a monorepo supporting multiple microservices, improving CI/CD workflows and deployment processes across services.
Resume.job3-responsibility-1-2: Collaborated on AWS-based architectures, working with SQS (async communication), Cognito (authentication), and Lambda (event-driven workflows).
Resume.job3-responsibility-1-3: Supported scalable systems using Docker and Kubernetes (EKS exposure), contributing to service reliability and availability.
Resume.job3-responsibility-1-4: Monitored production systems using Sentry, improving incident detection and reducing alert noise.
Resume.job3-responsibility-1-5: Automated development workflows using Bash scripting for environment setup and dependency management.
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-1: Development of custom DHL apps for Shopify with over 30.000 users using Meteor, TypeScript, React.js, Express.js, GraphQL, and MongoDB.
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-2: Unit and app testing with Mocha and Chai, and end-to-end testing with Cypress.
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-3: Code review of merge requests, contributing to code quality and production stability.
Resume.job2-responsibility-1: Developed frontend features for an AI-driven platform focused on legal use cases, improving usability and system reliability.
Resume.job1-responsibility-1: Contributed to a student platform used by programmers across Argentina, enabling real-time access to educational content. Built frontend features using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS, improving performance and user experience.
Resume.job1-responsibility-2: Developed web scraping pipelines using Puppeteer and Express.js to extract and normalize aviation market data. Automated data processing and storage using SQLite, reducing manual data collection efforts.
Resume.education1-description: I'm currently pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science at the University of the People, which allows me to study at my own pace while continuing to work full-time.
Resume.certification3-name: Introduction to DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering (LFS162)

Projects.project1-description: A personal homelab for experimenting with DevOps, SRE, and Linux tools on physical hardware.
Projects.project2-description: Scripts and tools for monitoring the use of RAM/CPU in Linux systems.
Projects.project2-technologies: Bash, Docker, GitHub Actions, Prometheus, Grafana
Projects.project3-description: Web platform for people interested or working in IT.
Projects.project3-technologies: Next.js, TypeScript, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Vercel
Projects.project4-description: My book publishing website where I write, edit, and manage my own publications.
